name: Chargehound
description: Chargehound (a Stripe company) automates chargeback responses across card networks via API. It assembles evidence, formats network-specific dispute submissions and reports win rates, helping merchants recover payment fraud losses without ma

seo.title: Chargehound — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Chargehound: Chargehound (a Stripe company) automates chargeback responses across card networks via API. It assembles evidence, formats network-specific dispute

when_to_use: Automated chargeback response for Stripe-connected merchants
Evidence assembly for Visa/Mastercard dispute submissions
Win rate analytics for chargeback recovery optimization
Dispute automation across multiple card network reason codes
API-driven dispute filing integrated with order management

pros: Automates evidence assembly across Visa, MC, Amex
Clear win-rate reporting per reason code
cons: Primarily useful for merchants on Stripe stack
Requires clean order data to auto-respond well
Does not prevent chargebacks, only contests them
review.verdict: Solid pick for Stripe merchants who want to stop hand-crafting dispute evidence, but it is recovery, not prevention.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large Stripe merchants with recurring card chargebacks across multiple reason codes.
review.not_for: Teams that need pre-dispute prevention via CDRN/Ethoca or non-Stripe ACH disputes.
